posts.text:
In addition to taking on woke DAs, I would love to partner with DPS to expand and enhance Texas’s Most Wanted

Criminals should never feel comfortable in Texas and we’ll make sure they don’t.

Grateful for the support of @TexasFarmBureau AG Fund. 

Texas must remain Texas, and that begins in our rural communities that produce the food, fuel, and fiber sustaining our way of life. As Attorney General, I will defend them at all costs.

Good spot - lunch/dinner too #TX21


Rich O'Toole (@RichOToole)

I had a breakfast taco this morning in Dripping Springs,TX. I’ve never heard of this place but my breakfast taco was absolutely incredible. 🙏🏽🌮🔥







— https://nitter.net/RichOToole/status/2035004368529854659#m

Texas needs a seasoned fighter as AG with the legal acumen and experience to lead one of the most critical offices in the country. 

My opponent DM Middleton II has never been inside a courtroom or practiced law and is NOT prepared to meet the moment. chiproy.com

Video

The dark money networks undermining Texas sovereignty, attacking our way of life, and helping put criminals back on our streets must be exposed and dismantled. 

As Attorney General, I’ll work every day to do exactly that. chiproy.com

Video

“Chip Roy has been one of the most fearless defenders of the Second Amendment in the entire U.S. House,” said Dudley Brown, President of the National Association for Gun Rights. 

“He doesn’t water it down, he doesn’t negotiate away your rights; he fights like hell to protect them. Texans can count on him to take that same tenacity into the Attorney General’s office.” @GunRightsPrez @gunrights

There will be no parallel legal systems in Texas hiding behind the First Amendment. 

Sharia Law is incompatible with Western Civilization and has no place in this country.

Video

Correct.  Just… and hear me out… work.


Mike Lee (@BasedMikeLee)

The Senate shouldn’t recess—not even for a weekend—until it has (1) funded DHS, and (2) passed the SAVE America Act



— https://nitter.net/BasedMikeLee/status/2035002107762266205#m
